title: NIT AP Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Andhra Pradesh has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the NIT AP Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Gover...
